shadcn-html / sheet

Minimal JS

Sheet

Extends the dialog pattern to display content that slides in from the edge of the screen. Built on native <dialog> + showModal() with CSS-only slide animations via @starting-style. Supports four sides: right, left, top, bottom.

Component Specification — components/sheet/sheet.md

Native basis

<dialog> + .showModal(). Same native benefits as Dialog — focus trap, Escape key, and ::backdrop.

Web Platform APIs

<dialog> showModal() ::backdrop @starting-style

Sides

• data-side="right" — slides from right edge (default)

• data-side="left" — slides from left edge

• data-side="top" — slides from top edge

• data-side="bottom" — slides from bottom edge

Wiring conventions

• data-sheet-trigger="[id]" on any element → opens that sheet

• data-sheet-close on any element inside → closes the sheet

• Click on backdrop → closes (click lands on <dialog> itself)

Animation

CSS-only enter via @starting-style. Slide + fade using transform + opacity. Exit via transition + allow-discrete.

ARIA

• role="dialog" and aria-modal="true" on <dialog>

• aria-labelledby → points to the sheet title id

• aria-haspopup="dialog" on the trigger

• aria-label="Close" on the X button

Right

Default side. The sheet slides in from the right edge — commonly used for edit-profile or settings panels.

<!-- Trigger -->
<button class="btn" data-variant="outline"
        data-sheet-trigger="sheet-right"
        aria-haspopup="dialog">Open Right Sheet</button>

<!-- Sheet (place as direct child of body) -->
<dialog id="sheet-right" class="sheet" data-side="right"
        role="dialog" aria-modal="true"
        aria-labelledby="sheet-right-title">
  <div class="sheet-content">
    <div class="sheet-header">
      <h2 class="sheet-title" id="sheet-right-title">Edit Profile</h2>
      <p class="sheet-description">Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-body">
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
        <div>
          <label class="label" for="sheet-name">Name</label>
          <input id="sheet-name" class="input" type="text" value="Cody Lindley">
        </div>
        <div>
          <label class="label" for="sheet-username">Username</label>
          <input id="sheet-username" class="input" type="text" value="@codylindley">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-footer">
      <button class="btn" data-variant="outline" data-sheet-close>Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn" data-variant="default" data-sheet-close>Save changes</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="sheet-close-x" data-sheet-close aria-label="Close">
    <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
         stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</dialog>

Left

Slides in from the left edge — ideal for navigation menus or sidebar-style panels.

<!-- Trigger -->
<button class="btn" data-variant="outline"
        data-sheet-trigger="sheet-left"
        aria-haspopup="dialog">Open Left Sheet</button>

<!-- Sheet -->
<dialog id="sheet-left" class="sheet" data-side="left"
        role="dialog" aria-modal="true"
        aria-labelledby="sheet-left-title">
  <div class="sheet-content">
    <div class="sheet-header">
      <h2 class="sheet-title" id="sheet-left-title">Navigation</h2>
      <p class="sheet-description">Browse sections of the application.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-body">
      <nav style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25rem;">
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline">Home</a>
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline">Dashboard</a>
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline">Settings</a>
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-accent transition-colors no-underline">Help</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="sheet-close-x" data-sheet-close aria-label="Close">
    <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
         stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</dialog>

Top

Slides down from the top edge — useful for notifications or announcement banners.

<!-- Trigger -->
<button class="btn" data-variant="outline"
        data-sheet-trigger="sheet-top"
        aria-haspopup="dialog">Open Top Sheet</button>

<!-- Sheet -->
<dialog id="sheet-top" class="sheet" data-side="top"
        role="dialog" aria-modal="true"
        aria-labelledby="sheet-top-title">
  <div class="sheet-content">
    <div class="sheet-header">
      <h2 class="sheet-title" id="sheet-top-title">Notifications</h2>
      <p class="sheet-description">You have 3 unread messages.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-body">
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
        <div class="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50">
          <div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0"></div>
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">New comment on your post</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">2 minutes ago</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50">
          <div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0"></div>
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">Deployment successful</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">15 minutes ago</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50">
          <div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground mt-1.5 flex-shrink-0"></div>
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">Team invitation accepted</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">1 hour ago</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-footer">
      <button class="btn" data-variant="outline" data-size="sm" data-sheet-close>Dismiss all</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="sheet-close-x" data-sheet-close aria-label="Close">
    <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
         stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</dialog>

Bottom

Slides up from the bottom edge — great for cookie consent, action sheets, or preference panels.

<!-- Trigger -->
<button class="btn" data-variant="outline"
        data-sheet-trigger="sheet-bottom"
        aria-haspopup="dialog">Open Bottom Sheet</button>

<!-- Sheet -->
<dialog id="sheet-bottom" class="sheet" data-side="bottom"
        role="dialog" aria-modal="true"
        aria-labelledby="sheet-bottom-title">
  <div class="sheet-content">
    <div class="sheet-header">
      <h2 class="sheet-title" id="sheet-bottom-title">Cookie Preferences</h2>
      <p class="sheet-description">Manage your cookie settings. You can enable or disable different types of cookies below.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-body">
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">Essential Cookies</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">Required for the website to function.</p></div>
          <span class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Always on</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">Analytics Cookies</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">Help us improve our website.</p></div>
          <input type="checkbox" checked>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div><p class="text-sm font-medium">Marketing Cookies</p><p class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">Used for targeted advertising.</p></div>
          <input type="checkbox">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sheet-footer">
      <button class="btn" data-variant="outline" data-sheet-close>Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn" data-variant="default" data-sheet-close>Save preferences</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="sheet-close-x" data-sheet-close aria-label="Close">
    <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
         stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</dialog>

JavaScript

Identical pattern to Dialog. Wire triggers via data-sheet-trigger, close buttons via data-sheet-close, and backdrop click. Targets dialog.sheet elements.

// Sheet wiring — same pattern as Dialog, targets dialog.sheet
document.querySelectorAll('[data-sheet-trigger]').forEach(function (trigger) {
  var sheet = document.getElementById(trigger.dataset.sheetTrigger);
  if (!sheet) return;
  trigger.addEventListener('click', function () {
    sheet._trigger = trigger;
    sheet.showModal();
  });
});

document.querySelectorAll('dialog.sheet').forEach(function (sheet) {
  sheet.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target === sheet) sheet.close();
  });
  sheet.querySelectorAll('[data-sheet-close]').forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function () { sheet.close(); });
  });
  sheet.addEventListener('close', function () {
    if (sheet._trigger) sheet._trigger.focus();
  });
});

Full specification → components/sheet/sheet.md
